title: FID-0103 MP object-respawn tail hardcodes s3=0 -> over-fires sound 82 for embedded (0x8000) regen objects

evidence.path: src/game/chrprop.c:5517 the FID-0103 respawn tail runs mpRespawnTailPlan with reparent_marker_s3 hardcoded 0. flags&0x8000 = PROPFLAG_INSIDEANOTHEROBJ (bondconstants.h:370, a real SP+MP flag). The port skips the reparent branch (chrprop.c:5487 if(!(obj->flags&0x8000))) then runs the tail with s3=0 -> play_respawn_sfx=1 -> sound 82. Retail's reparent path sets s3=1 which SUPPRESSES the sound. So embedded regenerating objects over-fire sound 82. Narrow: needs embedded + active timetoregen + maxdamage==0 + !(state&0x80).

history.note: Found by adjacent-bug review 2026-07-12. Fix ~2 lines: derive s3 from the 0x8000 flag (set s3=1 in the skipped reparent else-branch). MP-narrow; likely off the SP tapes.
